title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the SigTuple South Asia Partners family as a Senior Software Engineer in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SigTuple South Asia Partners:
SigTuple South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple South Asia Partners!
